ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the cryptocurrency's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for which the data is stored */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* Trading volume in BTC */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Name of the exchange where the market data is from */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in trading volume compared to the previous day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Average cost basis of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "pnl" REAL /* Profit and loss of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for which the alert is set */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news entry */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news was published */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency related to the news (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the transaction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was executed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
